title: Vacances portugaises
writer: Pierre Kast, Alain Aptekman, Jacques Doniol-Valcroze
actors: Françoise Arnoul, Michel Auclair, Jean-Pierre Aumont
plot: Françoise and her husband Jean-Pierre invite some friend couples to spend a weekend in their large villa on the Portuguese coast. What follows is a romantic intrigue, with each character discovering a little more about himself.
